Maybe sorting the cupboards needs to be more of a priority but I blame the house move! 😂 
.
#instagramvsreality #cleaningmotivation #cleaningaccount #relatablecontent #relatablemum
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator

items.caption:
The only background noise my brain is accepting from now on 😂

This is one of those jobs I’ve been meaning to do for ages and I’m so glad I finally did.🌿💦 

I’ve wanted a little water feature for a while, but didn’t want to spend a fortune so decided to DIY it. All you need is two planters, bricks (although I thought afterwards I could’ve just filled the whole planter with soil 🤔), a few flowers, white decorative stones and a solar fountain. 

I love how it finishes off this corner of the garden. The sound of the water just adds that little bit of zen. And adding wheels to the base means that I can move it around when I get bored and want a change ✨

#diygarden #diyhomeprojects #diywaterfountain #diyhomedecor #gardendecor
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator
items.transcript: I've wanted to add a bit of zen to the garden and make one of these DIY water fountains for a while now. Not sure why I chose to do it during a heatwave because I was sweating, but wait to see how it turns out because it was so worth it. You don't have to add wheels to the base, but I just did it so I could move it around the garden whenever I fancied a change. And this is the clever bit, it's a solar-powered fountain, so there's nothing complicated to it and I don't know why I've been putting it off for so long because it is so easy.

items.caption:
Try this 10-minute Big Mac taco for those low-energy days 🌮🍔

100g mince pressed onto a regular wrap, seasoned with salt & pepper, then cooked mince-side down for around 5 minutes. Flip, add a square of cheese and cook for a further 3 minutes until melted.

Finish with salad, gherkins and burger sauce for the ultimate Big Mac-inspired fakeaway 😍

Quick, easy and perfect for those days when you want something tasty without the effort.

Would you try it? 👀
.
#easymeals #easydinnerideas #quickmeals #quickrecipes #easydinners
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator

items.caption:
Finding hacks on the internet is my favourite hobby 💪🏼😂 Ad

So I tried a few summer hosting ones to make entertaining a bit easier…

✔️ A DIY fly-repellent candle centerpiece using lemon, water and lemongrass essential oil (lime and herbs optional) – a simple setup that helps keep flies away while still looking good on the table
✔️ The viral BBQ clean-up trick using onion on the grill to help loosen burnt-on residue before wiping everything down
✔️ And the reality of hosting little ones… melted ice cream dropped on the floor that turns into a sticky mess in seconds 🍦

The one thing all of these moments have in common? Mess happens fast before, during and after hosting! 

That’s where Regina Blitz comes in. It’s the UK’s favourite kitchen roll brand*. The Mega Sheets and 3-layer design make it easy to tackle spills, wipe surfaces clean, and handle everyday messes without overthinking it - whether you’re prepping, cooking or clearing up after guests.

It’s strong, absorbent, and always within reach when things don’t go quite to plan. 

Don’t clean it, BLITZ IT!

*Based on Nielsen
Total Coverage Value sales 52 weeks ending 26th January 2026.

#ReginaBlitz #BlitzIt #SummerHosting #HostingHacks #cleaninghacks
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator
items.transcript: I'm loving the summer but hating the flies, especially when we've got people over. So here's three hosting hacks I've learned from the internet, starting with this DIY fly repellent candle. You can just use lemons and lemongrass essential oil for this, but I saw someone else add some herbs, so I did this too because it looked so pretty. Next is a viral barbecue hack, which I handed straight over to my husband because this barbecue is none of my business. But rubbing half an onion over a hot grill helps lift loose debris and stops food sticking. And finally, while we're on the subject of cleanups, every get-together comes with a few messes. So my go-to is Regina Blitz. The mega sheets are really absorbent and the triple layer strength makes them a proper hosting essential.

items.caption:
I don’t know about you but stains always seem to show up at the worst possible moment 🙈 Ad

And although I love a cleaning hack, the laundry ones always seem to take forever to actually do anything! 

But that’s where Vanish Turbo comes in. It’s designed for busy lives and delivers a deep clean in as little as 30 minutes, tackling tough stains and odours without needing a long cycle.

With boosted Oxi Action power, it’s Vanish’s most advanced formula yet, built to give reliable results on everyday fabrics and colours even when you are short on time.

So you can load it, hit quick wash, and get on with your day knowing your laundry is taken care of. 

Trust Vanish, forget stains! 🧺🙌🏼

@vanishuk #laundryhacks #cleaninghacks #cleaningtips #cleaningmotivation #cleaningaccount
items.ownerFullName: Anna Louisa ✨ Home & Cleaning Content Creator
items.transcript: I've tried just about every stain removal hack on the internet, and while some of them work, they're not always the quickest. But there's a new product called Vanish Turbo, and it gives your clothes a deep clean in just 30 minutes. So let's try it on some tomato sauce and chocolate, basically the entire diet of my child. And while I wait, I set a 30 minute timer to see what I could get done in that time, but it turns out that 30 minutes isn't that long because I barely made it out the kitchen. But clearly it's enough time to get rid of stains because they were completely gone, the colours weren't faded, and everything came out smelling so fresh, so it gets a big fat yes from me.

items.caption:
The obsession with cleaning tools continues 🙊✨ ad 

all the links can be found in my bi0 under the heading ‘top 10 cleaning tools’ ✨

The right tools can make cleaning faster, easier, and actually more fun! 😂 These are my top 10 cleaning tools (in no particular order) that help me get the job done with less effort and better results:

1️⃣ Steam Cleaner - Perfect for deep cleaning and sanitising without harsh chemicals, leaving surfaces fresh and spotless.

2️⃣ Power Scrubber - Takes the hard work out of scrubbing and makes tackling multiple surfaces so much easier.

3️⃣ Damp Duster - Picks up dust quickly and efficiently without sending it flying around the room.

4️⃣ Shark Stain Striker - My go-to for lifting stubborn stains and refreshing carpets, rugs, and upholstery.

5️⃣ Dish Daddy Scrubbing Wand - it can be used on so much more than your dishes! Fill up with cleaning solution and you can use it to scrub multiple surfaces. 

6️⃣ Karcher Window Vac - dries and gives streak-free windows, mirrors, and shower screens in a fraction of the time.

7️⃣ Sonic Scrubber - Ideal for getting into small corners, crevices, and detail areas that are difficult to clean by hand.

8️⃣ Mattress Vacuum - Helps remove dust, dirt, and allergens to keep mattresses feeling fresh and clean.

9️⃣ Flash Speed Mop - Quick, convenient, and perfect for dusting walls when using the dust pads and keeping floors clean between deeper cleans.

🔟 Spin Mop - prevents using too much water when cleaning floors. There’s also an option that separates the dirty water from the clean meaning you’re not just moving dirt around. 

Which cleaning tool could you not live without? 👇
.
.
#cleaningtips #cleaningmotivation #cleaningaccount #instaclean #cleaningtools
